_comment: Autopilot ghost: a WASM virtual pad walks the room's slot 1 to the center cabinet and boots it, driven purely by fixed-point pad commands (no geometry access). Forge the cartridge first — e.g. `Puck.Demo --forge-volley volley.gbc` — then `Puck.Demo --run docs/examples/overworld-autopilot.json`. Parse-validation does not check modulePath — the run path does.
